title: Leons Dungeons Paintings
description: This Mod adds 15 new Paintings from Minecraft Dungeon
body:
This Mod adds 15 new Paintings from Minecraft Dungeon

- You can get the new Paintings in the same way like the normal vanilla ones
- This mod does not replace existing paintings

![Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0abdceecf0d0c039643cb79bd2932e89886a9cc7.png)
 

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
